title: True Oremistry
description: True oremestry its chemistry based mod what overhaul the vanilla ores quantity and add a compability with other mods.
body:
### True Oremistry its chemic mod what improves a count of vanilla ores by adding a 12 new actual metalls to game. 

Also add a dusts for all metalls and ores and nuggets.


# Ores and metalls:


![Metalls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09b4d2767d442dab04be0b903f1ecfcb9693217b.png)

![Wolfram products](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0beae8339f123b2fa81d10d1570caeda1778d8a6.png)

![Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96a5cdda6a98d19fe8076e15eb7ca313a66162bd.png)
**Mods compabilities:**

**Create**

**Immersive engering**

**Ad astra**

**All the ores**

**AE2(in progress)**
